name: Get series
description: Get all TV series tracked by Sonarr, or details for a single series by its Sonarr ID. Returns title, year, status, monitored state, season count and episode counts. Use the returned id (Sonarr series ID) with sonarr_get_episodes to check episode availability.

name: Build request
Format response
Get episodes
description: Get episodes for a series tracked by Sonarr. Returns episode number, title, air date and hasFile (true = episode is downloaded and available). Use sonarr_get_series first to find the Sonarr series ID. Optionally filter by season number.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["series_id"],"properties":{"series_id":{"type":"number","description":"Sonarr series ID from sonarr_get_series"},"season_number":{"type":"number","description":"Season number to filter by (omit for all seasons)"}}}

name: Build request
Format response
Get calendar
description: Get upcoming episodes from Sonarr. Defaults to the next 7 days. Returns series title, episode title, season/episode number, air date and whether the file is already downloaded.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","properties":{"start_date":{"type":"string","description":"Start date ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (default today)"},"end_date":{"type":"string","description":"End date ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (default 7 days from now)"},"unmonitored":{"type":"boolean","description":"Include unmonitored episodes (default false)"}}}

name: Build request
Format response
Get queue
description: Get the current Sonarr download queue. Returns series title, episode, download status, time left and file size.

name: Build request
Format response
